title: lepidium montanum subsp. jonesii
intro: Lepidium montanum subsp. jonesii, also known as Jones' cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support the immune system, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Lepidium montanum subsp. jonesii can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking, adding its peppery flavor to various dishes.
